import json, re, unicodedata, sys, math, os, textwrap, itertools

quran_path = "/mnt/data/file-Kjf8kioBqNjsW3Z6BUAgeu-quranic_verses.json"
hadith_path = "/mnt/data/file-D3aKALkQAv6nYj9sKob7Ho-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(quran_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    quran = json.load(f)

with open(hadith_path, "r", encoding="utf-8") as f:
    hadith = json.load(f)

type(quran), len(quran), list(quran[0].keys())[:10], len(hadith), type(hadith)[:10]
hadith[0] if isinstance(hadith, list) else list(hadith)[:3]

def normalize_arabic(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    # Remove tashkeel and tatweel
    tashkeel = re.compile(r"[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]")
    s = tashkeel.sub("", s)
    s = s.replace("ـ", "")
    # Normalize hamza forms
    s = s.replace("أ", "ا").replace("إ", "ا").replace("آ", "ا")
    s = s.replace("ؤ", "و").replace("ئ", "ي").replace("ة", "ه")  # heh/teh marbuta unify to heh
    s = s.replace("ى", "ي")
    # Remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s]", " ", s, flags=re.UNICODE)
    # Collapse spaces
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def contains_token_sequence(text, seq):
    return normalize_arabic(seq) in normalize_arabic(text)

full_span = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
snippet = "وَعَدَدَ ل...َ الشُكْرِ"

matches = []
for i, ay in enumerate(quran):
    if contains_token_sequence(ay['ayah_text'], "فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"):
        matches.append((i, ay))
len(matches), matches[:3]

matches_shukr = [(i, ay) for i, ay in enumerate(quran) if contains_token_sequence(ay['ayah_text'], "الشكر")]
len(matches_shukr), matches_shukr[:10]

matches_shkr = [(i, ay) for i, ay in enumerate(quran) if contains_token_sequence(ay['ayah_text'], "شكر")]
len(matches_shkr), [(m[1]['surah_id'], m[1]['ayah_id'], m[1]['ayah_text']) for m in matches_shkr[:10]]

import difflib

def strip_tashkeel(s):
    return re.sub(r'[\u0610-\u061A\u064B-\u065F\u06D6-\u06ED]', '', s)

def normalize_for_compare(s):
    if s is None:
        return ""
    s = strip_tashkeel(s)
    s = s.replace("ـ","")
    # unify Arabic letters
    s = s.replace("أ","ا").replace("إ","ا").replace("آ","ا")
    s = s.replace("ؤ","و").replace("ئ","ي").replace("ة","ه").replace("ى","ي")
    # remove punctuation
    s = re.sub(r"[^\w\s]", " ", s)
    s = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", s).strip()
    return s

def lcs_length(a, b):
    # dynamic programming LCS
    n, m = len(a), len(b)
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    for i in range(1, n+1):
        prev = 0
        for j in range(1, m+1):
            temp = dp[j]
            if a[i-1]==b[j-1]:
                dp[j] = prev + 1
            else:
                dp[j] = max(dp[j], dp[j-1])
            prev = temp
    return dp[m]

def similarity(a, b):
    A = normalize_for_compare(a)
    B = normalize_for_compare(b)
    if not A or not B:
        return 0.0
    lcs = lcs_length(A, B)
    sim = lcs / max(len(A), len(B))
    return sim

full_span = "وَعَدَدَ لَكُمْ فِعْلَ الشُكْرِ"
snippet = "وَعَدَدَ ل...َ الشُكْرِ"

norm_full = normalize_for_compare(full_span)
norm_snippet = normalize_for_compare(snippet)
norm_full, norm_snippet

best_q = None
best_q_score = -1
for ay in quran:
    s = ay['ayah_text']
    sc = similarity(full_span, s)
    if sc > best_q_score:
        best_q_score = sc
        best_q = ay

best_q_score, best_q['surah_id'], best_q['ayah_id'], best_q['ayah_text'][:120]

# get top 20 matches
scores = []
for ay in quran:
    sc = similarity(full_span, ay['ayah_text'])
    scores.append((sc, ay))
scores.sort(key=lambda x: x[0], reverse=True)
top_q = [(sc, ay['surah_id'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['ayah_text']) for sc, ay in scores[:20]]
top_q[:10]

best_h = None
best_h_score = -1
for h in hadith:
    matn = h.get('Matn') or h.get('hadithTxt') or ""
    sc = similarity(full_span, matn)
    if sc > best_h_score:
        best_h_score = sc
        best_h = h
best_h_score, best_h['hadithID'], (best_h.get('Matn') or best_h.get('hadithTxt'))[:150]

[(i, ay['surah_id'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['ayah_text']) for i, ay in enumerate(quran) if contains_token_sequence(ay['ayah_text'], cand)]
[(i, ay['surah_id'], ay['ayah_id'], ay['ayah_text']) for i, ay in enumerate(quran) if contains_token_sequence(ay['ayah_text'], "ولقد من عليكم")]

best_q_score_snip = -1
best_q_snip = None
for ay in quran:
    sc = similarity(snippet, ay['ayah_text'])
    if sc > best_q_score_snip:
        best_q_score_snip = sc
        best_q_snip = ay
best_q_score_snip, best_q_snip['surah_id'], best_q_snip['ayah_id'], best_q_snip['ayah_text'][:120]

cand = "اعْمَلُوا آلَ دَاوُودَ شُكْرًا"
sim = similarity(full_span, cand)
cand_norm = normalize_for_compare(cand)
full_norm = normalize_for_compare(full_span)
sim, cand_norm, full_norm
